title: laputa descends from the sky to celebrate columbus day
description:
Its reigning queen, Sarah Palin writes a book about their frustration over its three day tardiness. 
She titles it "Laputa by Liver: Regurgitations on Failure, Frogs, and Feet". 
Money collected from sales will go towards the first bridge to Laputa, which Palin does not endorse.
